title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 6.2g
sections: VEL’KOZ, THE EYE OF THE VOID
paragraphs: Vel’Koz is landing on the Rift and has his eye on you! We’ve also got some updates to AAA ARAM, welcome to Patch 6.2g!
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

It is unclear if Vel’Koz was the first Voidborn to emerge on Runeterra, but there has certainly never been another to match his level of cruel, calculating sentience. While his kin devour or defile everything around them, he seeks instead to scrutinize and study the physical realm—and the strange, warlike beings that dwell there—for any weakness the Void might exploit. But Vel’Koz is far from a passive observer, striking back at threats with deadly plasma, or by disrupting the very fabric of the world itself.
Vel’Koz will be released on September 12 at 00:01 UTC.
We hope you’ve studied up on your geometry. An event to celebrate the arrival of Vel’Koz is here!
Vel’Koz In the Rift will be released on September 12 at 00:01 UTC.

Earlier this patch we shared that there would be a Crystal Rose event, however it has been delayed and will launch in a future patch during the 6.3 patch cycle. Keep an eye on our future patch notes for more information!
Bonus Armor and Magic Resist grant per enemy hit: 1~15 → 3~9
Damage per stack: 1.5 + 0.5% Attack Damage + 0.25% Ability Power → 3~9 + 2% Bonus Attack Damage + 1% Ability Power
Damage: 60~120+60% Bonus Attack Damage + 30% Ability Power → 60~180+60% Bonus Attack Damage + 50% Ability Power
Missile Damage: 1.5% Maximum Health → 1% Maximum Health
